Welcome to Aquastar Inn

Fall in Love with Flowered Gardens & Coastal Charm

From the moment you arrive, the flowered gardens and warm glow of our cedar gazebo will tell you — this is somewhere different. Not a chain. Not a clone. A genuine New England inn tended with pride.

Our rooms have been freshly renovated with modern furnishings, hardwood floors, and every comfort you need. Evenings belong to the gazebo, the grill, and a sky full of stars. Mornings start with coffee before a short drive to the beach.

Check Availability

Our Fish-Shaped Pool

Westerly's most charming pool — 55 feet of sparkling water, surrounded by cone evergreens, teal umbrellas, and room to truly unwind.

Reserve a Room

Your Accommodations

Freshly Renovated Rooms

Modern furnishings, hardwood floors, and every in-room comfort. Simple. Clean. Yours.

Featured Room

King Room

King bed, hardwood floors, work desk, and blackout curtains. Everything you need, nothing you don't.

King Bed Work Desk A/C Free WiFi
In-Room Amenities

Full In-Room Kitchen

Mini fridge, microwave, Keurig coffee maker, and a cozy bistro table. No need to rush out for breakfast.

Mini Fridge Microwave Keurig
Private Bathroom

Renovated Baths

Glass walk-in showers, updated vanities, gold fixtures, and fresh-tiled walls throughout.

Glass Shower Updated Vanity Complimentary Toiletries

The Gazebo

A cedar pavilion with a polished granite table, string lights, and a grill. The best seat in Westerly when the sun sets.

The Grounds

Manicured gardens, meandering paths, towering trees, and the peaceful courtyard that guests return to summer after summer.

Southern Rhode Island

Explore What's Around You

Aquastar Inn sits at the heart of Rhode Island's most spectacular coastal region.

01 · Beach

Misquamicut Beach

Miles of pristine sandy beach, surf, and family fun — just minutes away. Rhode Island's most popular summer shoreline.

02 · Village

Watch Hill

A charming seaside village with the historic Flying Horse Carousel, lighthouse, and upscale boutiques along the water.

03 · Island

Block Island

Ferry from nearby Point Judith to dramatic bluffs, hidden beaches, and one of the most beautiful islands in New England.

04 · Downtown

Westerly

Wine shops, farm-to-table restaurants, galleries, and authentic New England charm — all within a short drive or walk.

05 · Nature

Burlingame State Park

3,000+ acres of hiking trails, freshwater swimming at Watchaug Pond, and camping just a short drive away.

06 · Activity

Fishing & Golf

Charter fishing boats, Weekapaug pier, and several well-regarded golf courses within a short drive of the inn.

Your Rhode Island Summer Starts Here

Open Memorial Day through Labor Day. Reserve early — we fill fast all season long.
